title: ThingsBoard Open-source IoT Platform
note: Open-source IoT platform source for device management, telemetry collection, visualization, SCADA dashboards, rule processing, alarms, and on-premises deployment.

title: Eclipse VOLTTRON
note: Open-source platform for building operations data, distributed sensing, control, visualization, fault detection, and grid-interactive building energy use cases.

title: Project Haystack
note: Open-source semantic data-modeling and web-service initiative for IoT, building, HVAC, lighting, automation, and environmental-system data.

title: Brick: A Uniform Metadata Schema for Buildings
note: Open building metadata ontology used as an enabler for vendor-neutral building and equipment telemetry models.

title: Foundations of Intelligent Additive Manufacturing
note: Technical review source for additive-manufacturing opportunities and constraints relevant to local fabrication and repair concepts.

title: Open Source Hardware Definition
note: Definition source for assessing whether physical hardware documentation and fabrication workflows are meaningfully open and reproducible.
